title: MCS Knives
description: Replaces swords with 16px Counter Strike knives. Applied via renaming at an anvil.
body:
I have made this resource pack to add special textures to the swords in Minecraft. These textures appear when your sword has a specific name.  

I recommend using Mini Items in combination with this reource pack.

I plan to add more textures in the future so please feel free to make suggestions.

Current Textures

- Diamond Sword
  - "Butterfly Knife | Doppler (Ruby)"
  - "Butterfly Knife | Doppler (Emerald)"
  - "Butterfly Knife | Case Hardened | Pattern #182"
  - "M9 Bayonet | Doppler (Ruby)"
  - "M9 Bayonet | Doppler (Emerald)"
  - "M9 Bayonet | Case Hardened | Pattern #601"
  - "Skeleton Knife | Doppler (Ruby)"
  - "Skeleton Knife | Doppler (Emerald)"
  - "Skeleton Knife | Case Hardened | Pattern #403"
  
- Netherite Sword
  - "Butterfly Knife | Doppler (Black Pearl)"
  - "Butterfly Knife | Doppler (Ruby)"
  - "Butterfly Knife | Doppler (Emerald)"
  - "Butterfly Knife | Case Hardened | Pattern #182"
  - "M9 Bayonet | Doppler (Black Pearl)"
  - "M9 Bayonet | Doppler (Ruby)"
  - "M9 Bayonet | Doppler (Emerald)"
  - "M9 Bayonet | Case Hardened | Pattern #601"
  - "Skeleton Knife | Doppler (Black Pearl)"
  - "Skeleton Knife | Doppler (Ruby)"
  - "Skeleton Knife | Doppler (Emerald)"
  - "Skeleton Knife | Case Hardened | Pattern #403"
